tools.name: get_business_context
tools.description: Get Gitsim product knowledge, pricing model, IP routing guidance, and eSIM fundamentals. Call this FIRST before helping a customer so you understand the product.

tools.name: search_packages
tools.description:
Search for eSIM data packages by country. Returns up to 10 packages per page sorted by price. Use the page parameter to paginate. No auth required. Call get_business_context first to understand IP routing and package types.

Package types:
- "regular": Fixed data pool (e.g. 3GB for 30 days). Best fo

tools.name: get_package
tools.description: Get details for a specific eSIM package by its ID. No authentication required.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create an order for an eSIM package. Returns a Stripe checkout URL where the user can pay. Requires a session key (from a previous tool call's structuredContent) or creates one automatically.

description: Check remaining data balance on an eSIM. Requires a session key and the eSIM's ICCID.

description.name: search_topup_packages
description.description: Find compatible top-up packages for an existing eSIM. Requires a session key and the eSIM's ICCID.

description.name: buy_topup
description.description: Purchase a top-up data package for an existing eSIM. Returns a Stripe checkout URL.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "search_packages" is 779 chars, far longer than this server's median (92). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Search for eSIM data packages by country. Returns up to 10 packages per page sorted by price. Use the page parameter to paginate. No auth required. Call get_bus…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "search_packages" stacks urgency/override words (important, always). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
